pi_items.verified_value: Verified Chinook SQLite database exists; actual copy found at benchmarks/cua_world/environments/dbeaver_env/data/chinook.db
pi_items.source: Direct file inspection and SQLite queries on actual database

Calculated: 365 (2009) + 365 (2010) + 365 (2011) + 366 (2012 leap year) + 365 (2013) = 1,826. Verified by executing recursive CTE query from 2009-01-01 to 2013-12-31 which returned exactly 1,826 rows.
Path cannot be verified without access to /home/ga directory; appears to be reasonable task output location
View name appears consistently in task.json description, setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py scripts
Verified by querying Chinook database: MIN(InvoiceDate) = 2009-01-01 00:00:00. This is the earliest invoice date in the database.
Latest invoice in Chinook database is 2013-12-22 00:00:00. Extending date range to 2013-12-31 creates a complete date dimension covering the invoice date range.

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, well-known public SQLite sample database representing a digital media store. Invoice data spans from 2009-01-01 to 2013-12-22 with 412 total invoices. The date dimension (2009-01-01 to 2013-12-31) contains exactly 1,826 days, accounting for the 2012 leap year (366 days). January 2009 has invoices on 6 days and zero invoices on 25 days. The database is publicly available on GitHub (lerocha/chinook-database) and contains 11 tables including invoices with Total column for revenue calculations.
